warmup: Convert 0.375 to a fraction and 2/5 to a decimal. Identify the HCF of 36 and 54.

practice.title: Recipe Ratio Adjuster
practice.description: A bread recipe uses flour, water, and yeast in the ratio 10:6:1. If you have 450g of flour, how much water and yeast do you need? What is the total dough weight?

practice.title: Map Scale Distances
practice.description: A map has a scale of 1:500000. Two towns are 8.4 cm apart on the map. What is the real distance in km? If you travel at 60 km/h, how long does the journey take?

practice.title: Partnership Profit Split
practice.description: Three partners A, B, and C invest in the ratio 5:7:4. The business earns a profit of Rs 96,000. How much does each partner receive? What percentage of total profit does the largest investor get?

practice.title: Combined Ratio Solver
practice.description: Given a:b = 3:5 and b:c = 4:7, compute the combined ratio a:b:c using a function. Verify the common term 'b' matches in both original and combined ratios.

practice.title: Proportion Validator
practice.description: Write a function that checks if four numbers are in proportion (a:b = c:d). Return True or False. Test with at least 3 cases including one that fails.
